options.content: Traefik → Nginx → APIs · Four golden signals at a glance · expand rows for detail

targets.expr:
sum(sum by (job) (
  rate(http_requests_total{job=~"roboshop-user|roboshop-cart|roboshop-catalogue|roboshop-payment", route!="/metrics", handler!="/metrics", namespace="roboshop"}[5m])
  or rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{job=~"roboshop-orders|roboshop-shipping", uri!~"/actuator.*", namespace="roboshop"}[5m])
  or rate(flask_http_request_total{job="roboshop-ratings", namespace="roboshop"}[5m])
))

sum(sum by (job) (
  rate(http_requests_total{job=~"roboshop-user|roboshop-cart|roboshop-catalogue", route!="/metrics", status_code!~"2..", namespace="roboshop"}[5m])
  or rate(http_requests_total{job="roboshop-payment", handler!="/metrics", status!~"2..", namespace="roboshop"}[5m])
  or rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{job=~"roboshop-orders|roboshop-shipping", uri!~"/actuator.*", status=~"5..", namespace="roboshop"}[5m])
  or rate(flask_http_request_total{job="roboshop-ratings", status=~"5..", namespace="roboshop"}[5m])
))

sum by (job) (
  rate(http_requests_total{job=~"roboshop-user|roboshop-cart|roboshop-catalogue|roboshop-payment", route!="/metrics", handler!="/metrics", namespace="roboshop"}[5m])
  or rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{job=~"roboshop-orders|roboshop-shipping", uri!~"/actuator.*", namespace="roboshop"}[5m])
  or rate(flask_http_request_total{job="roboshop-ratings", namespace="roboshop"}[5m])
)

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, job) (rate(http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"roboshop-user|roboshop-cart|roboshop-catalogue|roboshop-payment", route!="/metrics", namespace="roboshop"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, job) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{job=~"roboshop-orders|roboshop-shipping", uri!~"/actuator.*", namespace="roboshop"}[5m])))

sum by (job) (
  rate(http_requests_total{job=~"roboshop-user|roboshop-cart|roboshop-catalogue", route!="/metrics", status_code!~"2..", namespace="roboshop"}[5m])
  or rate(http_requests_total{job="roboshop-payment", handler!="/metrics", status!~"2..", namespace="roboshop"}[5m])
  or rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{job=~"roboshop-orders|roboshop-shipping", uri!~"/actuator.*", status=~"5..", namespace="roboshop"}[5m])
  or rate(flask_http_request_total{job="roboshop-ratings", status=~"5..", namespace="roboshop"}[5m])
)
